parameters.query: SELECT pc.id, pc.user_id, pc.user_type, pc.amount_entitled, pc.currency, pc.week_ref, uba.account_name, uba.revolut_counterparty_id, uba.revolut_counterparty_account_id, uba.sort_code, uba.account_number, uba.iban, uba.bic, uba.bank_country FROM payout_claims pc JOIN user_bank_accounts uba ON uba.id = pc.bank_account_id WHERE pc.status = 'pending' AND pc.week_ref = TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'IYYY"-W"IW')
UPDATE payout_claims SET status = 'processing' WHERE week_ref = '{{$json.weekRef}}' AND status = 'pending'
INSERT INTO payout_audit_log (event_type, performed_by, metadata) VALUES ('batch_sent', 'system', '{"count": {{$json.count}}, "gbp_total": {{$json.gbpTotal}}, "eur_total": {{$json.eurTotal}}}')
